trades.reasoning: Mega-cap tech with clean score-95 momentum signals on a risk-on day — RSI 56, MACD bullish crossover, price above SMA-20 with room before overbought territory.
Applied Materials is a direct beneficiary of AI capex build-out; score 95 with RSI 56.6 and MACD bullish crossover confirms momentum without being extended.
Optical networking name riding AI infrastructure demand; score 95, RSI 57.1, MACD bullish — higher volatility warrants medium conviction over smaller position.
Strongest RSI among score-95 candidates at 64.8 with confirmed MACD crossover and price well above SMA-20, filling the fourth open slot on momentum.

decisions.briefing: Risk-on session with NASDAQ +1.3% and S&P 500 +0.7% creates a clear green light to deploy the idle $1,172 sitting in cash. Portfolio is already up 32.4% and all six positions remain within stop-loss bounds, so the priority today is filling the four open slots with top-scoring tech and semiconductor names. AAPL and AMAT take high-conviction spots given their macro tailwinds from AI infrastructure spending; AAOI and INVX fill out the book at medium conviction to control size in more volatile names.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities rallied broadly on Monday as investors rotated back into growth and technology stocks amid easing trade-war concerns and continued optimism around AI capital expenditure commitments from major cloud providers. The NASDAQ outperformed the broader S&P 500 by nearly double, reflecting sector-specific appetite for semiconductor and software names. No major Federal Reserve commentary disrupted sentiment, leaving risk appetite firmly in control heading into the week.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股週一全面反彈，投資者重新湧入成長股與科技股，主要受惠於貿易摩擦憂慮緩和，以及各大雲端服務商持續加碼人工智慧資本支出的樂觀預期。那斯達克指數漲幅近乎標普500的兩倍，顯示半導體及軟體板塊的資金需求格外強勁。聯準會方面未有重大表態打擾市場情緒，風險偏好主導全周開局走勢。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A 'risk-on' day is when investors feel confident enough to move money out of safe assets like bonds or cash and into higher-returning but more volatile assets like stocks — especially growth and tech. Today's NASDAQ +1.3% vs S&P 500 +0.7% spread is a classic risk-on signature: smaller, faster-growing companies outperform the safer blue chips. When the market is risk-on, momentum strategies like ours get favorable tailwinds.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險偏好」（Risk-On）是指投資者信心充足，願意將資金從債券或現金等避險資產，轉移到波動性較高但潛在回報更豐厚的股票，尤其是成長股與科技股。今日那斯達克漲幅（+1.3%）遠超標普500（+0.7%），正是典型的風險偏好訊號——中小型成長企業跑贏防禦型藍籌股。在風險偏好環境下，我們所採用的動能選股策略往往能獲得額外的順風助力。
